trade.summary: Limited bilateral trade. Brazil exports soybeans, coffee, poultry, and tobacco to Poland. Poland exports machinery, furniture, electronic components, and vehicles to Brazil.

diplomatic.summary: Normal diplomatic relations mediated primarily through EU-Brazil channels. Poland and Brazil have limited direct bilateral engagement. Some cultural ties through Polish diaspora in southern Brazil (Paraná state).

military.summary: No military cooperation. Poland is a NATO member; Brazil is non-aligned. Very limited defense contacts.

financial.summary: Very limited bilateral investment. Some Polish companies have Brazilian market presence. Polish diaspora in Paraná maintains modest commercial ties.

energy.summary: Very limited energy trade. No significant bilateral energy relationship.

scientific.summary: Limited but growing scientific cooperation. Joint research in mathematics, physics, and agricultural sciences. Polish-Brazilian academic exchanges facilitated by Polish diaspora community.
